name: agent-thought-map
description: Create compact Mermaid graphs of an agent's observable work and explicit rationale checkpoints.

interface.shortDescription: Render agent work and rationale as Mermaid graphs.
interface.longDescription: Agent Thought Map renders compact Mermaid flowcharts from generic observable events, plus an optional separate rationale graph from explicit checkpoints. Thin adapters for Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode normalize native events into the same schema, and the core does not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Thought Map for this task.
Render the latest agent thought map.
